investigation_summary: $8.9B talc ovarian/meso settlement pool (2023); Texas two-step bankruptcy rejected for separating tort liability (2024). $5B multi-state opioid settlement (2021). 2013 $2.2B DOJ Risperdal guilty plea + civil — misbranding to elderly dementia patients and pediatric uses. Benzene sunscreen recall 2021.

profile.parent: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ); consumer now largely Kenvue (KVUE)
profile.tax_summary: Pharma-heavy parent effective ~15–18% recent years; Kenvue ~22% — structure split post-spin commentary.
profile.legal_summary: Talc MDL — ~60k claims; 2023 settlement framework ~$8.9B; bankruptcy divisive merger strategy failed judicially 2024. Oklahoma opioid bench trial $465M (later appellate path). National $5B opioid deal. Risperdal 2013 criminal + civil resolution — off-label dementia marketing with mortality risk / pediatric marketing. Neutrogena/Aveeno aerosol benzene recalls.
profile.labor_summary: No systemic developed-market labor scandal surfaced in this pass.
profile.political_summary: Pharma lobbying standard; opioids public settlements politically salient.
profile.product_health: Talc withdrawn regionally; acetaminophen liver toxicity labeling debates; baby shampoo reformulated 2013 after dioxane/formaldehyde-releaser pressure.
profile.executive_summary: Litigation defined recent executive tenure; no racket tobacco analogue.
